creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: romain->portmgr

The mono failure might be transient (did not crashed for the 2 previous 
exp-runs, never saw this error on my system).  BTW in the meantime mono-2.10.2 
and banshee-2.0 where released so I updated the patches accordingly.  While 
Banshee crashes after a while (and is  markedBROKEN), I added a shar for Banshee 
dependencies. 

http://people.freebsd.org/~romain/mono-2.10.2.diff 
http://people.freebsd.org/~romain/mono-2.10.2.shar 

Thanks!
